name: Red Bull Soapbox Race
overview: Hosted by NASCAR Hall of Famer Dale Earnhardt Jr. and motorsports announcer Mike Bagley, the series features amateur teams as they design and build one-of-a-kind, gravity-powered soapbox racers that compete - and crash - on intricate, downhill courses.

trailers.title: 5 Minute First Look | Red Bull Soapbox Race | Discovery
